title: How do I resolve a Respondus error from copying over a Canvas course?
plain_text: If a quiz is copied from another course, even if the Canvas and Respondus settings have already been set, the instructor will still need to select the Respondus Lockdown Browser link. Otherwise, students will get an error: 'Error: Course (MONITOR_ENABLED), EXAM (0X01000e) - Could not connect to Respondus server (AWS) for the course or exam settings.' The solution for this error is to select the link as shown below to initialize the course with Respondus. An alternate version of this error is 'Error: Unable to continue - Exam title states a webcam must be used, but the exam settings don't indicate it is selected.' Resolve the Respondus error when copying From the Course Navigation sidebar in Canvas, select 'Respondus LockDown Browser'. If you receive a screen asking you to authorize LockDown Browser, select Authorize. If you do not see LockDown Browser in your course menu, you will need to enable it by managing your course navigation links to be able to use it with Canvas Quizzes. Review the How do I use Respondus LockDown Browser and Monitor to proctor exams? to learn more about using Respondus in Canvas.
body_html:
If a quiz is copied from another course, even if the Canvas and Respondus settings have already been set, the instructor will still need to select the Respondus Lockdown Browser link. Otherwise, students will get an error: 'Error: Course (MONITOR_ENABLED), EXAM (0X01000e) - Could not connect to Respondus server (AWS) for the course or exam settings.' The solution for this error is to select the link as shown below to initialize the course with Respondus. An alternate version of this error is 'Error: Unable to continue - Exam title states a webcam must be used, but the exam settings don't indicate it is selected.'

Resolve the Respondus error when copying

  • From the Course Navigation sidebar in Canvas, select 'Respondus LockDown Browser'. If you receive a screen asking you to authorize LockDown Browser, select Authorize.
  • If you do not see LockDown Browser in your course menu, you will need to enable it by managing your course navigation links to be able to use it with Canvas Quizzes.
Review the How do I use Respondus LockDown Browser and Monitor to proctor exams? to learn more about using Respondus in Canvas.
